protein_name: Receptor for alpha-ketoglutarate. Seems to act exclusively through a G(q)-mediated pathway. Belongs to the G-protein coupled receptor 1 family. Detected in kidney and, to a lower extent, in placenta. Not detected in brain tissues including the frontal cortex, caudate putamen, thalamus, hypothalamus, hippocampus or pons. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
